final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce promotional poster for cross-border shopping campaign, designed for social media sharing, in the layered typographic spirit of contemporary commercial collage.

Style/medium: commercial poster design with the dimensional typography and intentional clutter-control of modern collage art, where letterforms become architectural elements
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, layered text blocks stacked at varying depths, product or hero subject positioned to partially obscure mid-ground typography, foreground and background elements creating three distinct planes
Subject: hero product or promotional figure positioned to break the text layers, creating visual tension between commerce and art
Scene/backdrop: promotional environment with stacked typographic elements forming the structural backbone of the image
Lighting/mood: the controlled chaos of a well-curated sale, energetic but not frantic, with each layer holding its own breathing room
Color palette: saturated promotional tones balanced by neutral anchors, the warmth of urgency tempered by cool restraint
Materials/textures: dimensional letterforms with subtle shadow and weight, the tactile quality of cut-paper collage translated to digital precision
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, complex but not cluttered, at least one product or subject overlapping typography, multiple font layers with clear hierarchy
Avoid: true chaos without hierarchy, flat single-plane composition, decorative elements without commercial purpose, generic stock aesthetic
